case_messages_author_check.name: case_messages_author_check
case_messages_author_check.value: (author_type = 'lawyer' AND lawyer_author_id IS NOT NULL AND portal_author_id IS NULL) OR (author_type = 'client' AND portal_author_id IS NOT NULL AND lawyer_author_id IS NULL)

line_item_type_check.name: line_item_type_check
line_item_type_check.value:
(type = 'time' AND time_entry_id IS NOT NULL AND expense_id IS NULL)
          OR (type = 'expense' AND expense_id IS NOT NULL AND time_entry_id IS NULL)

portal_users_scope_check.name: portal_users_scope_check
portal_users_scope_check.value: (org_id IS NOT NULL) != (user_id IS NOT NULL)

owner_check.name: owner_check
owner_check.value: "subscriptions"."user_id" IS NOT NULL OR "subscriptions"."org_id" IS NOT NULL

idx_time_entries_running.name: idx_time_entries_running
idx_time_entries_running.where: "time_entries"."timer_started_at" IS NOT NULL AND "time_entries"."timer_stopped_at" IS NULL
